source_description: PJM Reliability Pricing Model (RPM) Base Residual Auction (BRA) Reports
citation: PJM Interconnection, LLC. 'RPM Base Residual Auction Results.' Various years. Accessed March 29, 2026.
known_gaps: Only RTO-wide clearing prices shown. Locational Deliverability Areas (LDAs) may clear at different prices.
[VERIFY]: All prices manually extracted from PDF reports — cross-check against source documents.
notes: Prices in $/MW-day. The clearing price represents the marginal cost of capacity in PJM's forward capacity market. The 2025/2026 price spike is the most significant market signal in this dataset. Auction dates shifted from their normal May schedule starting with the 2023/2024 delivery year due to FERC proceedings on market design.

data.notes: RTO clearing price. Some LDAs cleared higher.
RTO clearing price. Some LDAs cleared higher.
Significant drop from prior years. New demand curve methodology.
Auction delayed from normal May timeline due to FERC proceedings.
Continued low clearing prices. Some constrained LDAs higher.

Dramatic price spike — nearly 10x previous year. Driven by tighter reserve margins, coal/gas retirements, and increased demand projections (data center load growth). Highest clearing price in PJM RPM history.
Second consecutive year of elevated prices. Confirms structural tightening, not one-off.
